# AI Fine-Tuner

## What it is
AI Fine-Tuner is a plugin/skill for AI coding agents that generates interactive HTML fine-tuning interfaces with sliders and live preview. Instead of iterating on visual values in chat ("make the shadow bigger... no less... try 12px"), the agent generates a single HTML page where the user drags sliders and sees their actual element update in real-time.

## Key features
- Bespoke UI: every tuner is generated from the user's actual element and parameters
- Pre-built templates: the agent fills in placeholders, not the infrastructure
- Infinite canvas: Figma-style pinch-to-zoom (25%-400%) and pan
- Any language: preview is HTML, output translates to CSS, Tailwind, Flutter, SwiftUI, React Native, JSON
- Animations: full keyframe animation preview with timing, easing, and transform controls
- Any visual property: shadows, colors, spacing, radii, typography, transforms, gradients, SVG attributes

## How to use it
- Claude Code: type /ai-fine-tuner
- OpenAI Codex: type $ai-fine-tuner
- Cursor: type /ai-fine-tuner
- Windsurf: type @ai-fine-tuner
- Cline: type /ai-fine-tuner
- Aider: /read AGENTS.md then ask to fine-tune

## Installation
- Claude Code plugin: claude plugin install ai-fine-tuner@https://github.com/muhamadjawdatsalemalakoum/aifinetuner.git
- Other platforms: clone the repo and run the platform-specific installer (install-claude.sh, install-codex.sh, install-cursor.sh, etc.)

## License
Source Available — free to use as an AI agent skill or plugin. Commercial redistribution or competing products prohibited.
